name: great-engineers
description: Nine engineering personas (Carmack, Hopper, Knuth, Torvalds, DHH, Hejlsberg, Eich, Dijkstra, Sandi Metz) + four MVP skills for technical specs, design reviews, and project initialization. Drafted via cross-plugin orchestration with great-authors writers. v0.1 MVP.

plugins.name: great-engineers
plugins.description: Nine engineering personas + four operational skills (engineers-channel, engineers-project-init, engineers-write-spec, engineers-design-review). Companion to great-minds, great-authors, great-filmmakers, great-publishers, great-marketers. For Claude Code.

plugins.name: great-engineers-dxt
plugins.description: Same personas and skills as great-engineers, packaged as a Claude Desktop extension. Build: cd distribution/dxt && npm install && npx @anthropic-ai/dxt pack
